ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the user */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name of the user */,
  "send_mail" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user receives mail notifications */,
  "directory_name" TEXT /* Name of the directory the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "locked_out_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was locked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password policy */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length of the password */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the password */,
  "require_uppercase" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether uppercase letters are required */,
  "require_lowercase" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether lowercase letters are required */,
  "require_numbers" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether numbers are required */,
  "require_special_chars" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether special characters are required */,
  "password_history" INTEGER /* Number of previous passwords to keep in history */,
  "max_attempts" INTEGER /* Maximum number of failed login attempts before lockout */,
  "lockout_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of account lockout in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_passwords" (
  "password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date the password was set */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the password */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the password policy applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_passwords_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_passwords_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES password_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access attempt */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_result" INTEGER /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multi_factor_auth" (
  "mfa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MFA method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "method" TEXT /* MFA method (e.g., SMS, email, token) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the MFA method is enabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the MFA method was created */,
  "secret" TEXT /* Secret key for the MFA method */,
  "qr_code" TEXT /* QR code for the MFA method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multi_factor_auth_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directories" (
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory */,
  "directory_name" TEXT /* Name of the directory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the directory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the directory was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directory_users" (
  "directory_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory user mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "directory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user directory mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directory_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_users_directory_id FOREIGN KEY ("directory_id") REFERENCES directories ("directory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directory_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the action (e.g., user, role, permission) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., suspicious login, password reset) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily activity, security breach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
